data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Instagram bio link integration.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the Instagram bio link integration, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this integration exists or functions as required. The linked use case outlines the need for this integration but lacks concrete evidence to demonstrate its implementation or effectiveness. Therefore, the validation step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the Instagram bio link integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
